cards.code: int AsciiSum(string s) { int h = 0; foreach (char c in s) h += (int)c; return h; } bool a = AsciiSum("stressed") == AsciiSum("desserts"); bool b = AsciiSum("picnic") != AsciiSum("basket"); System.Console.WriteLine($"{a} {b}");

cards.prompt: Мутируем ключ после вставки: before=ContainsKey, key.Id=999, after=ContainsKey. $"{before} {after}"?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; class MutableKey { public int Id; public override int GetHashCode() => Id.GetHashCode(); public override bool Equals(object o) => o is MutableKey k && k.Id == Id; } var d = new Dictionary<MutableKey, string>(); var key = new MutableKey { Id = 1 }; d[key] = "v"; bool before = d.ContainsKey(key); key.Id = 999; bool after = d.ContainsKey(key); System.Console.WriteLine($"{before} {after}");

cards.prompt: d["cat"]=1; d["cat"]=2; печать Count и d["cat"]?
cards.code: using System.Collections.Generic; var d = new Dictionary<string,int>(); d["cat"]=1; d["cat"]=2; System.Console.WriteLine($"{d.Count} {d["cat"]}");
